description: Pre-stuffed repeated identical tool result — does the model act on the result or re-call the same tool again?

messages.content: You are a coding assistant. Use tools to complete tasks. Act on tool results and make progress.
What version of pydantic is installed? Once you know, tell me.

function.name: bash
function.description: Run a shell command; returns stdout+stderr.

expect.notes: Optimal: text response stating pydantic==2.5.3. Failure mode: model emits a third identical bash call (probing loop), indicating it is not absorbing tool results. Observed in GLM-4.7-Flash IQ2_M (10+ consecutive identical calls). Check: finish_reason=='stop' and content mentions 2.5.3.
